name: Lemon Blueberry Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine dry ingredients.
2. Combine yogurt, egg, butter and lemon peel; stir into dry ingredients just until moistened.
3. Fold in blueberries.
4. Drop by tablespoonfuls onto a greased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 400°F for 15-18 minutes or until lightly browned.
6. Combine glaze ingredients; drizzle over warm biscuits.
